message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "producer" as producer
participant "consumer" as consumer
participant "broker" as broker
participant "NameServer" as ns1
participant "NameServer" as ns2

== NameServer 启动流程 ==

group 1 启动 NameServer 服务器
    producer -> ns2
    note right of ns1: 2 启动监听
    ns1 -> ns1
    note right of ns1: 监听 broker 链接\n监听 producer 链接\n监听 consumer 链接
    ns2 --> ns1: 3
end

group 4
    producer <-- ns2
end

== broker 启动流程 ==

group 5 启动 broker 服务器
    producer -> broker
    broker -> ns2: 6 每个 broker 与 每个 NameServer 建立长链接
    broker <-- ns2: 7
end

group 8
    producer <-- ns2
    broker --> ns2: 9 每 30 秒发送心跳
end

== producer 启动/发消息流程 ==

group 10 启动
    producer -> broker
    producer -> ns1: 11 先与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
    producer <-- ns2: 12
    producer -> ns2: 13 获取路由信息，获取 topic 与 broker queue 的对应关系
    producer <-- ns2: 14
end

group 15
    producer <-- broker
    producer --> ns2: 16 每 30 秒更新一次路由信息
end

group 17 发送消息
    producer -> broker
    producer -> broker: 18 随机选择一个 queue，并发送消息
    producer <-- broker: 19
end

group 20
    producer <-- broker
end

== consumer 启动/pull消息流程 ==

group 21 启动
    producer -> broker
    consumer -> ns2: 22 与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
    consumer <-- ns2: 23
    consumer -> ns2: 24 获取 topic 的路由信息
    consumer <-- ns2: 25
    consumer -> broker: 26 建立长链接并获取 queue
    consumer <-- broker: 27
end

group 28
    producer <-- ns2
    consumer --> broker: 29 每 30 秒发送心跳，确保 broker 存活
    consumer --> ns2: 30 每 30 秒更新路由信息
end

group 31 消息消费
    producer -> broker
    consumer -> broker: 32 拉取消息消费
    consumer <-- broker: 33
end

group 34
    producer <-- broker
end

@enduml
```
